FRONTIER-BROKEN_FORGE_RELIC.title: Eye of Judgment
FRONTIER-BROKEN_FORGE_RELIC.description: All cards held by Shumit have at least [gold]Reforge[/gold] 2.
FRONTIER-DIVINE_EYE_RELIC.title: Eye of God
FRONTIER-DIVINE_EYE_RELIC.description:
All cards held by Shumit have at least [gold]Reforge[/gold] 4.
All cards' [gold]Masterpiece[/gold] requirement is reduced by 5.
FRONTIER-HEATPROOF_APRON_RELIC.title: Heatproof Leather Apron
FRONTIER-HEPHAESTUS_BLOOD_RELIC.title: Blood of Hephaestus
FRONTIER-ANCIENT_ANVIL_RELIC.title: Ancient Anvil
FRONTIER-ANCIENT_ANVIL_RELIC.description: Whenever you play an upgraded card, gain 3 Block.
FRONTIER-FUSIONER_HAMMER_RELIC.title: Fusioner Hammer
FRONTIER-FUSIONER_HAMMER_RELIC.descripti: Whenever you play an upgraded card, gain 5 [gold]Vigor[/gold].
FRONTIER-FUSIONER_TONGS_RELIC.title: Fusioner Tongs
FRONTIER-FUSIONER_TONGS_RELIC.descriptio: Whenever you play an upgraded card, draw 1 card.
FRONTIER-FUSIONER_ANVIL_RELIC.title: Fusioner Anvil
FRONTIER-FUSIONER_ANVIL_RELIC.descriptio: Whenever you play an upgraded card, gain 5 Block.
FRONTIER-ENDLESS_LABOR_RELIC.title: Endless Labor
FRONTIER-ENDLESS_LABOR_RELIC.description: At rest sites, [gold]Smith[/gold] upgrades 2 additional cards.
FRONTIER-UNBURNABLE_BODY_RELIC.title: Unburnable Body
FRONTIER-UNBURNABLE_BODY_RELIC.descripti: The [gold]Heat[/gold] threshold for gaining [gold]Body Burn[/gold] increases from 200 to 300.
FRONTIER-MASTERPIECE_MUSEUM_RELIC.title: Masterpiece Museum
FRONTIER-MASTERPIECE_MUSEUM_RELIC.descri: At combat start, gain 2 [gold]Strength[/gold], 2 [gold]Dexterity[/gold] and 2 Energy for each [gold]Masterpiece[/gold] card in your deck.
FRONTIER-ETERNALLY_BURNING_FURNACE_RELIC:
At combat start, gain 70 [gold]Heat[/gold].
Whenever you draw a [gold]Burn[/gold], [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it, draw 1 card and gain 20 [gold]Heat[/gold].
